title: Sucat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sucat with a Z-Score of +5.31. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sucat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 17.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, and the wind speed is approximately 3.3 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of significant wind and low humidity is exacerbating the situation, leading to a critical level of heat stress.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
